purpose: Track legacy Shell Cognition labels until each subsystem is confirmed presentation-local or re-homed to the correct architecture domain.

systems.label: Eyes/Sensory Intake
systems.reason: Live signal collection is Observability evidence; external capture must enter through Gateway membranes.

systems.label: Conversation Eye
systems.reason: Dialogue-derived findings are live evidence; canonical memory writes must be Kernel-governed.

systems.label: Memory Matrix
systems.reason: Scored memory indexes are not Shell display state and must not become browser-owned truth.

systems.label: Dream Sequencer
systems.reason: Sequencing relevance refreshes is coordination; durable memory receipts remain Kernel-owned.

systems.label: Memory Auto-Recall
systems.reason: Recall routing is coordination over Kernel-governed memory facts, not presentation state.

systems.label: Shadow Signal Classifier
systems.reason: Signal classification starts as evidence and may be consumed by Orchestration, but Shell should not own the classifier.

systems.label: Shadow Dispatch Reliability
systems.reason: Dispatch, retry, ack, and escalation contracts are coordination/delivery concerns.

systems.label: Browser Text/Diff Lane
systems.reason: Browser snapshots are boundary evidence and should be bounded at Gateway/Observability, not stored as Shell cognition.

systems.label: Realtime Adaptation Loop
systems.reason: Adaptation is coordination and must be validated before authority promotion.

systems.label: Low-Burn Reflexes
systems.reason: Reflex selection is workflow/coordination; Shell may only render or collect input for it.
